name: Cream of Shiitake Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 small Onion (peeled and stuck with 2 cloves)
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------BOUQUET GARNI-----------------------
Tie in cheesecloth.
------------------------SOUP, CON'T------------------------
4 tbsp Rice flour (or barley or oat flour)
4 tbsp Cold milk (about)
8 oz Shiitake mushrooms
-------------------------OPTIONAL-------------------------
6 tbsp Heavy cream
2 tbsp Madeira
Reserved mushroom slices
1. PLACE THE MILK, ONION, peppercorns, salt and bouquet garni in a saucepan.
2. Bring slowly to a boil.
3. Form a smooth paste of the rice flour and the cold milk.
4. Stir briskly into the just-boiling milk until there are no lumps.
5. Simmer over very low heat for 20 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, cut off the tough ends of the mushroom stems.
7. Reserve a few mushroom slices for garnish and chop the remaining mushrooms coarsely.
8. Strain the milk mixture through a fine sieve back into the saucepan.
9. Add the chopped mushrooms and continue simmering 5 minutes.
10. Add the cream and Madeira, if desired, and serve in hot bowls garnished with a slice of mushroom.
